leadText: X-Scissor (Japanese: シザークロス Scissor Cross) is a damage-dealing Bug-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM81 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM24 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR60 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM105 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM081 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] X-Scissor inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] X-Scissor's PP has been reduced to 10, and it has been given an increased chance at landing a critical hit. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 10 Agile Strong Power 80 60 100 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Crit. stage +1 +1 +2 ? ? ? ? sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user slashes at the foe by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors. LA The user strikes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. S V The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes, claws, or the like as if they were a pair of scissors. ZA The user attacks using scythes, claws, or the like as if they were a pair of scissors.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる Conq. The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors. MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] X-Scissor is the only move to begin with the letter X. In the Pokémon Complete National Pokédex , this move was referred with its Japanese name as "Scissor-Cross", instead of "X-Scissor".
